name: Plantain-Pineapple Saute
recipeIngredient: 2 Plantains, peeled and cut into 1/2 inch chunks
2 cups Fresh or canned, drained pineapple chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Place plantain chunks in a saucepan of water to cover.
2. Bring to boiling. Reduce heat. Simmer 5 minutes.
3. Drain the plantains.
4. In a skillet, melt the butter or margarine. Add the plantain pieces.
5. Saute 2 minutes. Add pineapple chunks, spices, and pineapple juice or water.
6. Cover and simmer for 5 more minutes.
7. Add honey to taste. Serve as a dessert or side dish for ham or pork.
